## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and technical updates.](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [November performance: 3,000 clicks (4x increase since August), with GrowthX contributing 532 clicks/week](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Best week in 3-4 months: 700 total clicks (400 from new articles, 300 from existing)](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to shoppable/interactive video topics; 31 new articles published](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Technical fixes: Webflow subdomain issue resolved, UTM tracking for blog CTAs needed](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Topics

### Performance Metrics

  - [November: 3,000 clicks total (4x increase since August)](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [GrowthX contribution: 532 clicks/week (5.32 clicks/day average)](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Best week: 700 total clicks](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [400 from new articles](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [300 from existing content](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Content refreshes generating 40-50 clicks on average weeks, up to 70 on good weeks](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on shoppable video and interactive video topics](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [31 new articles published this week, 13 more coming next week](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Current backlog: 322 articles](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Aiming for 600 clicks/week in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Considering revenue-generating topics for January (e.g., "improve your strategy", "improve your sales revenue")](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Webflow subdomain issue resolved: Indexed pages reduced from 7 to 3-4](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [UTM tracking needed for blog CTAs to attribute leads in HubSpot/Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [UI improvements needed:](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
      - [Increase spacing between headings (H2, H3, H4)](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [Adjust body font size for better readability](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

### Industry Insights

  - [December expected to be slower due to holidays; uptick anticipated in January](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Shopify API access enables competitor analysis and strategy reports](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Potential for case studies and marketing automation based on niche/website growth data](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement UTM tracking for blog CTAs (Cameron to coordinate with Camille)](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Adjust UI elements: increase heading spacing and body font size](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Randomly assign authors to blog posts (alternating between team members)](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Monitor keyword rankings for newly published shoppable video content](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Prepare personalized demos for potential new client (Ramp) introduced by Yi Jin](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Continue focus on shoppable and interactive video content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Develop revenue-generating topics for January content push](https://fathom.video/share/LkH-JCUBfKrMm9CHpCHagzyppg3CNbxH?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
